# THIS WEEKEND ONLY: Women's boatneck sweaters at $29.99

**From:** Tommy Hilfiger Company Stores <tommyhilfiger@e.tommy.com>
**Date:** Thu, 09 Apr 2026 06:08:02 -0600

Tommy Hilfiger

 Visit usa.tommy.com for store locations. All styles not available at all locations. May not be available on usa.tommy.com.<br><br>   BOATNECK SWEATER NOW $29.99<br> Prices valid 4/9/26 - 4/12/26. Select styles. Exclusions may apply. While supplies last. See associate for details. Not valid outside of the United States.<br><br>  SHIRTS & SHORTS STARTING AT $34.99<br> Prices valid 4/7/26 - 4/15/26. Select styles. Exclusions may apply. While supplies last. See associate for details. Not valid outside of the United States.<br>
<br>  20% OFF $100+ OR 15% OFF ENTIRE PURCHASE FOR HILFIGER CLUB MEMBERS
<br> OFFER IS VALID 4/7/26 - 4/15/26 for Hilfiger Club members only. All offers are redeemable for an amount up to the discount stated on this Email and must be presented in-person at Tommy Hilfiger stores in the United States, Puerto Rico, and Guam. It may be used only once whether or not fully redeemed and must be surrendered at purchase with any remaining value of the Offer forfeited. Not redeemable for store credit or cash. The offers may not be combined with any other promotion and have no cash value. Offers are not valid for previously purchased merchandise, gift cards, or Internet transactions. Any discount (as shown on the receipt) applied to merchandise that is returned will be deducted from any refund amount. Customer must present email at time of purchase to receive the offers.
 Reproductions of the offers will not be accepted. PVH associates not eligible. Not valid in department stores, at Tommy Hilfiger Clearance stores, outside of the United States, Guam and Puerto Rico, or on usa.tommy.com.
